title: transfer — broadcast channels
description: One private per-user channel carrying the lifecycle events of that user's xfer_jobs. SPA subscribes when the user opens the transfer screen (or the dashboard's 'Recent jobs' panel) and toasts progress + completion without polling.

channels.name: user.{userId}.transfer
channels.description: Lifecycle stream for xfer_jobs where causer_id = userId.
channels.authorize: User is the addressed user (auth()->id() === userId).
